title: Sales Operations Analyst
description:
GEICO is a Fortune 500 car insurance company serving 13M+ policy holders. We've become synonymous with affordable insurance.

We're seeking a Sales Operations Analyst to join our Insurance team in Research Triangle Park. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Analyze sales data and pipeline metrics to identify trends and opportunities
Support sales team with territory planning and forecasting
Develop tools and dashboards for sales reporting and performance tracking
Implement process improvements to increase sales productivity
Manage sales operations systems and data integrity
Prepare sales reports and present insights to management

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years in sales operations, business analysis, or sales support
